relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Bildad gives his final brief speech.
He places dominion, dread, and heavenly peace with God.
Divine troops and light exceed counting.
He asks how any mortal can be righteous or clean before the Divine.
Even moon and stars are not clean enough in this frame.
How much less fragile humanity, formed from dust.
